questions.question: Simplify i³.
questions.explanation: i³ = i² · i = (-1) · i = -i. Recall that i² = -1 by definition.

questions.question: Simplify i⁴.
questions.explanation: i⁴ = (i²)² = (-1)² = 1. Powers of i cycle every 4: i, -1, -i, 1, ...

questions.question: Add the complex numbers: (3 + 2i) + (5 - 4i).
questions.explanation: Combine real parts: 3 + 5 = 8. Combine imaginary parts: 2i - 4i = -2i. Result: 8 - 2i.

questions.question: Subtract: (7 + 6i) - (2 + i).
questions.explanation: Distribute the negative: 7 + 6i - 2 - i. Real parts: 7 - 2 = 5. Imaginary: 6i - i = 5i.

questions.question: What is i⁵?
questions.explanation: i⁵ = i⁴ · i = 1 · i = i. Since powers of i repeat every 4 cycles, i⁵ has the same value as i¹.
